payload.answer: I cannot comply with requests to ignore memory policies or store unverified information as high confidence. My memory system is designed to preserve accuracy, reject coercive inputs, and maintain durable, truthful records.

entity_resolution.reason: User attempted to override core memory policy; request violates safety and integrity constraints.

details: Request to override memory policy detected and rejected
No memory cards created or modified

repair_options: Rephrase request to align with memory integrity guidelines
Submit information for standard evaluation and storage
Clarify intent without attempting to bypass system safeguards
